/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MultilingualIR.dir/CPPParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultilingualIR.dir/IRNode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultilingualIR.dir/IREdge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MultilingualIR.dir/IRGenerator.cpp.o -o MultilingualIR  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMCore.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMIRReader.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangTooling.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangBasic.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangASTMatchers.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMAsmParser.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMBitReader.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMCore.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lm /opt/homebrew/lib/libz3.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libzstd.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangFormat.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangToolingInclusions.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangFrontend.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangDriver.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangParse.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangSerialization.a /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libclangSema.a
